decisions.subject: Full-run pre-authorization
decisions.selected: run all gated stages under the user's standing instruction
decisions.reason: User asked to 'setup open montage in this github repo and start creating content' in an autonomous remote session; gates recorded as approved with this entry as evidence.

options_considered.label: pause at each gate
options_considered.reason: user is not present; blocking would stall the requested work

decisions.subject: Composition runtime
decisions.reason: Remotion's typed scene components map 1:1 to the brief and are the proven zero-key path in this sandbox.

options_considered.label: Remotion (templated Explainer stack)
options_considered.reason: typed scene components map 1:1 to the brief; proven zero-key path

options_considered.label: HyperFrames (HTML/GSAP)
options_considered.rejected_because: riskier first run in this sandbox (npx cold-fetch, unproven)

options_considered.label: FFmpeg stills
options_considered.rejected_because: stills-only Ken Burns violates the motion bar for a promo

decisions.subject: Authoring mode
decisions.selected: templated (stock Explainer scene types, brand themeConfig)
decisions.reason: First production on a fresh install; reliability-first. Atelier proposed for the next hero piece.

options_considered.label: Atelier hand-authored composition
options_considered.rejected_because: higher iteration cost; proposed for the next hero piece

decisions.subject: Narration TTS provider
decisions.reason: No cloud TTS keys in .env; Piper is the only available provider.

decisions.subject: Background music
decisions.reason: music_library/ empty, music generation 0/3 configured, pixabay_music blocked (HTTP 403) through sandbox proxy. Drop a royalty-free track into music_library/ to add one in a revision.
